biological_replicate: the frozen thawed BOECs from three different cows were cultured separately
technical_replicate: The co-culture experiments (oviductal epithelial cells + spermatozoa) were repeated three different times
experimental_design: the cargo of the BOECs derived EVs when incubated with spermatozoa in a contact and a non-contact co-culture model
factor_value: the cargo of the BOECs derived EVs when incubated with spermatozoa
number_of_fractions: the fractions 6–9, containing EVs, were pooled together (total 800 μl)
